---
title: "Mini Project 6: Personal Notebook"
---

## Goal

Build a simple personal notebook app that can add, view and search notes.

## Skills used

- menus
- loops
- files
- strings
- functions
- planning before coding

## Menu

```text
1. Add note
2. View notes
3. Search notes
4. Quit
```

## Steps

1. Write `add_note()`.
2. Write `view_notes()`.
3. Write `search_notes()`.
4. Create the menu loop.
5. Test every option.

::: {.callout-tip collapse="true"}
## Click to reveal hints

Use append mode to save notes. Use `.lower()` for case-insensitive search. Use `while choice != "4"` for the menu.

:::

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
## Click to reveal one possible structure

Use three functions: `add_note()`, `view_notes()` and `search_notes()`. Keep the menu at the bottom of the file so the functions are defined before they are called.

:::

## Extensions

Add dates, categories, note counts or a delete option.
